neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.safety.hazid
ISO 17776 Major Accident Hazard (MAH) catalogue and bow-tie skeleton builder.

    StidHazopDataSource.buildNode(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, int index)
    Builds a single HAZOP node template from a node record.
    HAZOPTemplate
    HAZOPTemplate.generateGrid(HAZOPTemplate.Parameter... parameters)
    Generate the full default deviation grid (all guide-word × parameter combinations) with empty causes/consequences for the user to fill in.
    HAZOPTemplate
    HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator.populate(HAZOPTemplate source)
    Produce a new HAZOP node with consequence and safeguard columns auto-populated from the catalogue.
